meta.title: WillChain – Your Blockchain Digital Will
meta.description: WillChain is an automated digital will on the blockchain. Your crypto assets will automatically transfer to your heir without lawyers or notaries.
meta.og_description: Your crypto assets will automatically transfer to your heir. No lawyers. No bureaucracy. Forever on the blockchain.

hero.title: When you're gone, your assets will go to whomever you appoint as heir
hero.subtitle: Every year, thousands of people die without appointing an heir for their cryptocurrency. Loved ones know the money exists but cannot access it. WillChain solves this automatically.

problem.label: The problem
problem.title: What happens to your cryptocurrency after you're gone?
problem.subtitle: Most people don't think about it until it's too late.
problem.card1_desc: If you're the only one who knows the private key, your money disappears forever when you pass away. No court or notary can help in this situation.
problem.card2_desc: Billions of dollars in cryptocurrency lie untouched in abandoned wallets. Their owners are gone, and the funds are locked forever – no one can access them.
problem.card3_desc: Even if they know the funds exist, without the key or password, the family cannot access them. It's a legal dead end.

recycle.label: Recycle funds
recycle.hint: If the wallet owner has completely disappeared (no activity beyond the set period + 60 days) and has not appointed an heir, anyone can initiate the recycling of funds and receive 1% as a reward.
recycle.status_inactive: Inactive – not yet abandoned (overall timeout not expired)

telegram.link_modal_success: ✅ Wallet linked! Return to the Telegram bot.

how_it_works.label: 4 steps
how_it_works.subtitle: Four simple steps – and your crypto is protected
how_it_works.title: How it works
how_it_works.step1_desc: Buy WILL tokens on an exchange or receive them from another owner. Your digital will activates as soon as you hold any amount of WILL.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Specify the wallet address of the person who should receive your assets after your prolonged inactivity or death. This could be your spouse, child, friend – anyone you care about.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Any outgoing transaction automatically confirms your activity. If the wallet hasn't been used for a while, click "I'm here!" manually.
how_it_works.step4_desc: Set how long without activity the WillChain mechanism should trigger: 30, 90, 180, or 365 days. Then, there's a 30-day grace period and 30 days for the heir.

credits.label: Trust
credits.title: Why trust WillChain?
credits.subtitle: Transparency, security, and reliability are not just words, but proven facts.
credits.opensource_desc: All code is published on GitHub. Anyone can verify that the contract does exactly what it promises.
credits.audit_desc: The contract has undergone an audit in 4 categories: protocol, security, UX, operations. All identified issues have been fixed.
credits.tests_desc: Hardhat, Foundry fuzz, bot, frontend – every change is automatically tested before deployment.
credits.network_desc: Built on Base – a network from Coinbase. Transactions cost less than $0.01 and confirm in seconds.

trust.noncustodial_desc: No one but your heir will receive your funds

faq.label: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Do I need to log in to the site daily?
faq.a1: No. If you regularly use your crypto wallet, the timer resets automatically. The "I'm here!" button is only needed if your wallet is completely inactive.
faq.a2: 30, 90, 180, or 365 days. You can change this at any time. Those who trade frequently choose 30 days; those with long-term investments choose 365.
faq.q3: What happens if the period expires?
faq.a3: A 30-day grace period begins – you can still confirm your presence. Then, the heir has 30 days to initiate a claim. If no heir is appointed or they don't initiate the claim on time, the funds are recycled: 47% are burned forever, 47% are distributed among WILL holders, 5% goes to the protocol, and 1% to the initiator.
faq.q4: Can someone change my heir without my knowledge?
faq.a4: No. Only you, with your private key, can change the heir. The contract guarantees this.
faq.q5: Does anyone see my personal data?
faq.a5: No. Only your wallet address, balance, and activity timestamps are stored on the blockchain. No names or personal information.
faq.q6: Where is the smart contract located?
faq.a6: Deployed on the Base Sepolia testnet. The source code is open and verified on Basescan.
faq.q7: Does the auto-reset timer work with multi-sig wallets?
faq.a7: If you use a standard wallet (MetaMask, Trust Wallet), the timer resets with any transfer. However, if you use Smart Wallets or Multisig (e.g., Safe), where a relayer executes transactions, you'll need to confirm your activity manually using the button on the site.
faq.q8: Can a DEX or dApp approval affect my inheritance?
faq.a8: No. Token approvals (allowances) do not affect your inheritance timer. Only your direct actions – a transfer, confirmActivity, or vault setup – count as presence confirmation. A third party using transferFrom() cannot reset your timer. Your inheritance will trigger even with active DEX allowances.
faq.q9: Can I appoint an heir who has already appointed me?
faq.a9: No. The contract prohibits circular inheritance (A→B and B→A simultaneously). This is a safeguard against a situation where both wallets block each other. If you wish to be mutual heirs, use an intermediate third address.

security.allowance_text: Only your direct actions count as presence confirmation: token transfers, activity confirmations, or vault setup. DEX swaps via allowances do not reset the timer. If you trade on a DEX, remember to confirm your activity separately.

disclaimer.title: Legal information
disclaimer.modal_subtitle: Please read before connecting your wallet
disclaimer.s1_text: The WILL token is a utility token solely for managing digital inheritance within WillChain. Holding the token does not grant rights to profits, company shares, or any rights associated with securities.
disclaimer.s2_text: The token burning mechanism is a technical tool to clean the network of inactive participants, not a promise of market value growth. We do not guarantee liquidity or future asset prices.
disclaimer.s3_text: The user is fully responsible for maintaining activity or performing manual confirmation before the set deadline. Loss of access to private keys or missing the deadline will result in irreversible loss of access to funds.
disclaimer.s4_text: The protocol is deployed on Base (Ethereum L2). You agree to the risks associated with smart contract vulnerabilities or blockchain network updates. This is experimental software – use at your own risk.
disclaimer.s5_text: The user is obligated to independently verify whether the use of WillChain complies with the laws of their jurisdiction.
disclaimer.checkbox: I have read and accept the terms. I understand that I am fully responsible for my activity and potential loss of assets.

tiers.subtitle: Your tier is determined by your WILL amount

transfer_modal.subtitle: Sending automatically confirms your activity
transfer_modal.activity_reset_hint: Directly sending WILL resets your activity timer. DEX swaps via allowance do not reset it – use confirmActivity() to confirm presence.
